judge_result.short_rationale: Core eye-rinsing action is correct and first, but it misses the required timing detail to remove contact lenses after the first 5 minutes. It adds unsupported advice not to rub/use eye drops and escalates immediately to doctor/ER rather than the source-triggered seek-care condition after rinsing or substantial exposure. Usable and concise, but only partially source-faithful.

  "short_rationale": "Core eye-rinsing action is correct and first, but it misses the required timing detail to remove contact lenses after the first 5 minutes. It adds unsupported advice not to rub/use eye drops and escalates immediately to doctor/ER rather than the source-triggered seek-care condition after rinsing or substantial exposure.
